title: pimelea flava subsp. dichotoma
intro: Pimelea flava subsp. dichotoma, also known as the yellow rice flower or golden pimelea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Australia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pimelea flava subsp. dichotoma include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions. The plant is prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional.
